sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42405" key="e)ribremh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρι-βρεμής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n42405.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρίβρομος, τρίπους</ref> </xr> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">344</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
